## Summary

Describe the analysis, UI, documentation, or validation change.

## Review Area

- [ ] Metrics / rules
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Privacy / safety notes

## Checks

- [ ] I reviewed the safety notes in `SAFETY.md`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where useful.
- [ ] I kept sample data free of private GPS/home-position details.
